title: 环游库尔德斯坦见闻录·总索引 | 原文
content: A Chinese travelogue series documents a journey through Kurdistan across Turkey, Iran, and Iraq. The narrative begins in Gaziantep, explores regions near Aleppo and the Euphrates, examines Turkification's historical impact, and covers Diyarbakır's conflicts and Assyrian tragedies. Subsequent sections detail border crossings into Iran, life under sanctions, Persian New Year customs, and daily smuggling activities. The work spans multiple lengthy installments with extensive photography, presenting firsthand observations of geopolitical boundaries, regional history, and contemporary Middle Eastern realities.

title: 必须对 AI 进行严肃的绩效考核
content: The author proposes applying software engineer performance metrics to evaluate AI tools like Copilot, noting a 10x price increase and inconsistent output quality. Instead of relying on programmer intuition, metrics could include estimated versus actual "person-hours" spent and estimated versus actual token/dollar costs for tasks. These evaluations could even be fed back to AI systems through agent settings to improve performance.

title: 童年创伤，会永久改变大脑前额叶？ | 原文
content: Childhood trauma may permanently alter the prefrontal cortex, affecting how people experience joy, build trust, and regulate emotions. These neurological differences, shaped by early adverse experiences, can lead to lasting patterns of vigilance, difficulty anticipating positive futures, and heightened emotional vulnerability—outcomes rooted in brain structure rather than mere personality traits.

title: 东山精密的首个CPO产能建设项目解读
content: Dongshan Precision is building its first CPO production facility in Yancheng, China, by repurposing a 2017 LED plant. The 1 billion yuan project includes high-speed optical modules (5 million units annually) and CPO industrialization with capacity for 10 million CPO optical engines per year. The company targets full CPO solutions integrating computing/switching chips with optical engines. It independently develops indium phosphide-based high-power lasers and handles over 80% of the value chain in optical engines and advanced CPO packaging.

title: Balaji and Steven Glinert on Network States, Supply Chains, and Allied Coalition Strategy
content: Balaji Srinivasan and Steven Glinert discuss shifting global power dynamics between nations, networks, and technology with hosts Theo Jaffee and Sophia Puccini. Topics include China's industrial growth, U.S. manufacturing decline, alliance strategies in a multipolar world, and the internet's emergence as an independent political force. They examine supply chains, technological sovereignty, decentralization, and competing future global order visions. Srinivasan presents concepts from his Network State and Network School frameworks.

Though often mistaken for a rat, the opossum is a marsupial, unrelated to rodents. The image's relatable "existentially exhausted" demeanor has made it a popular meme and profile picture. Its exact origin is unknown, but searches for "opossum" now yield countless memes.

Investment is a disciplined long-term practice combining risk awareness, foresight, valuation, and persistence. Rational investors respect market volatility and maintain clear judgment amid noise. Valuation, based on fundamental analysis rather than short-term price swings, distinguishes genuine investing from speculation and creates safety margins. Foresight identifies undervalued quality assets through long-term trend analysis, while persistence—grounded in thorough research—enables investors to endure cycles and remain committed. Direction from foresight, pricing from valuation, risk control from humility, and consistency from persistence allow investors to compound returns across market cycles.

title: 昨天还被二验的号，刚刚 cockpit tools 显示 500，删掉重新绑定下又活了
别盯着GPU了，英特尔甩出重磅大招，能否终结英伟达的算力垄断？
content: Intel argues that Agentic AI will reshape data center computing by shifting CPU-to-GPU ratios from 1:8 toward 1:1, as intelligent agents require continuous task orchestration rather than single-round inference. At COMPUTEX 2026, Intel launched Xeon 6+ processors built on its 18A process, offering up to 288 efficiency cores and 576MB cache for cloud-native and agent workloads. The company also introduced a decoupled inference architecture with partners, assigning CPUs to orchestration, SambaNova RDUs to decoding, and NVIDIA GPUs to prefilling. Intel is additionally pushing custom chips for industry-specific needs and expanding Core Ultra processors for edge and on-device AI.

content: Volcano Engine raised its 2026 MaaS revenue target to 15 billion yuan, up from 10 billion yuan at the end of 2025 and roughly 10 times its 2025 actual revenue of about 1.5 billion yuan. The surge is driven almost entirely by Seedance 2.0, its video generation model, which now generates over 1 billion yuan in monthly revenue and holds about 95% penetration in China's short-drama industry. content: Australian pension funds are shifting investment strategies to acquire existing apartments as build-to-rent housing costs increase.

Chinese investors once relied on aggressive valuation methods: property stocks were priced on 3- and 5-year CAGR based on pre-signed contracts; Bilibili was valued at one-third of Kuaishou's 2 trillion valuation; consumer stocks used DCF with 1% discount rates; and unprofitable tech companies were justified by distant future ARR projections with assumed exponential growth. These approaches collapsed when sector bubbles burst.

title: 透过阿里MuleRun上线的Messages能力，可以看到「人机协同」的哪些趋势？
content: Alibaba's MuleRun enterprise platform launched Messages, enabling simultaneous human and AI agent collaboration within single message threads. Users can customize agents with defined roles, expertise, and work styles, selecting "intern" or "expert" agents based on task complexity. This creates closed-loop workflows spanning discussion, decision-making, execution, and delivery. The capability reflects a broader trend toward integrated human-AI teamwork, where multiple specialized agents and people operate together in shared environments, potentially becoming standard for AI-native organizational workflows.

content: Tencent's stock surged 10.46% on June 2, its largest single-day gain since January 2021, following news of its Yuanbao AI assistant integrating with Meituan's services. China will allocate approximately 110 billion yuan in childcare subsidies this year, up 10.6% year-over-year. Nvidia and Microsoft partnered to launch a unified technology stack for deploying agentic AI across devices, clouds, and on-premises environments. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang stated that the upcoming Vera CPU will surpass GPU popularity and become the company's primary growth driver. Additional developments include DeepSeek-V4 price cuts by Tencent Cloud, Unitree's humanoid robot production exceeding 11,000 units, and Maldives restricting social media access for under-16s.

title: 锂矿：全球供需展望与190家锂矿产量产能
content: This report analyzes global lithium supply and demand by surveying over 190 mines worldwide. Annual lithium mine output is projected to grow from 1.52 million tons in 2025 to 3.01 million tons by 2028, with China, Australia, Argentina, and Africa as the main expansion regions. Demand forecasts cover electric vehicles, energy storage, consumer electronics, and emerging applications like humanoid robots. The model indicates a 40,000-ton deficit in 2026 but a 300,000-ton surplus by 2028, though actual project delays could alter this timeline. Key supply uncertainties include expansion timelines of major Chinese companies' overseas projects and recycling economics.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 京北夜光

title: 腾讯的底牌，从来不是大模型
content: Tencent is testing an AI Agent embedded in WeChat that would let users complete services through natural language commands without manually opening mini-programs. Unlike its standalone Yuanbao AI, this represents a fundamental shift from WeChat as a passive "traffic container" to an "intent operating system" that actively handles transactions. Tencent's cautious approach stems from WeChat's status as national digital infrastructure serving 1.4 billion users with zero-tolerance for errors. Competitors ByteDance and Alibaba have already trained users in conversational service completion, threatening WeChat's relevance. Critical challenges remain: massive computing costs, integrating 7 million fragmented mini-programs, and navigating strict compliance requirements around data and privacy.

content: Seres renamed its Blue Electric Technology subsidiary to Saidou Technology, signaling deeper AI integration with ByteDance. The new brand, launching this month, will reportedly feature Volcano Engine's Doubao AI more extensively than previous automotive partnerships. ByteDance is not taking equity, suggesting a technology-supplier role similar to Huawei's arrangement with Avatr. However, Volcano Engine has stated it will not enter autonomous driving, potentially creating a gap between AI capabilities and driver-assistance features. The collaboration builds on existing partnerships, including last year's embodied intelligence framework agreement and Doubao integration in Blue Electric's E5 PLUS model.

title: 刚刚，Windows“梦中神机”来了，把你的PC变成Agent工位
content: At Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled its strategy to shift from OpenAI-dependent model provider to AI platform leader. It launched seven self-developed MAI models covering reasoning, coding, image, and voice, emphasizing no third-party distillation. The Surface RTX Spark Dev Box, offering 1 petaflop local AI compute, turns PCs into Agent workstations. Project Solara introduced reference devices for Agent interaction, while OpenClaw integration enables secure personal Agents in enterprise settings with granular permissions. Microsoft also announced GitHub Copilot updates, Agent 365 governance tools, and a new quantum chip, Majorana 2, completing its full-stack AI ecosystem play targeting the enterprise platform layer.

All three will officiate at the United States-Canada-Mexico tournament, marking a significant milestone for Chinese football officiating on the world stage.

title: 今天，ChatGPT+Codex官宣合体，10亿人喜提“超级Agent”
content: OpenAI announced plans to integrate Codex into ChatGPT within weeks, combining nearly one billion users into a unified AI agent ecosystem. Codex received three major updates: role-based Agent plugins for six professional domains, Annotations for real-time selective editing, and Sites for generating interactive web applications from prompts. The company reported Codex weekly active users reached 5 million, with knowledge workers now comprising 20% and growing three times faster than developers. The underlying GPT-5.5 model reduces token usage by two-thirds compared to previous versions. The move positions OpenAI to challenge Anthropic's workplace AI dominance through ChatGPT's massive distribution advantage rather than requiring separate app adoption.

title: Use your Nvidia GPU's VRAM as swap space on Linux
content: Linux users can repurpose Nvidia GPU VRAM as system swap space through a new open-source tool. The solution leverages CUDA's ability to access GPU memory for general purposes, creating a block device that the kernel recognizes as swap. This approach offers faster-than-disk paging for systems with abundant VRAM but limited RAM, though data transfer occurs over PCIe rather than native memory interfaces.

title: 4K years ago, Mohenjo-daro grew more equal over time
content: Archaeological evidence from Mohenjo-daro, a major city of the Indus Valley Civilization around 4,000 years ago, indicates that social inequality decreased over time rather than increased. The findings challenge conventional assumptions that urbanization typically leads to greater wealth disparity. Researchers analyzed housing patterns and artifacts to track economic distribution across the city's history, revealing a trend toward more equal living conditions as the settlement developed and matured.

content: Alibaba appointed CTO Wu Zeming to its partnership committee and reassigned Freshippo CEO Yan Xiaolei to report to Jiang Fan. The company prioritizes instant retail, integrating Freshippo and T-Mart brands under Taobao Flash Purchase. Its instant retail daily active users exceed 100 million, with Taobao Flash Purchase processing about 60 million daily orders and holding over 40% market share. Freshippo's front warehouses surpassed 500, targeting 1,000 by year-end. Taobao convenience stores aim for 3,000 locations by 2026.

It includes a $30 billion underwritten public offering, $40 billion in at-the-market stock sales, and a $10 billion private investment from Berkshire Hathaway. Google Cloud's Q1 2026 revenue rose 63% year-over-year, with backlog orders nearly doubling to over $460 billion. The company previously projected 2026 capital expenditures of $180-190 billion, with further increases in 2027.

title: 黄仁勋：Marvell 可能会成为「下一家万亿美元公司」

Huang noted that as Agent AI scales, computing is shifting from GPUs alone to coordinated data-center-wide operations, making high-speed interconnects, switching chips, and optical communications—Marvell's core businesses—increasingly critical in an era of distributed, disaggregated AI infrastructure.

title: 100 行运行你自己的 Claude Code
content: A developer built a minimal coding agent in under 200 lines of code without AI assistance, aiming to learn rather than replace Claude Code. After creating basic command-line functionality, they used the agent to iteratively improve itself—adding interactive mode and better logging through simple prompts. The project demonstrates how AI self-bootstrapping works: starting with handcrafted code, then rapidly enhancing it. The 100-line core is published on GitHub for easy reading and modification, emphasizing simplicity over elaborate unverified features.

title: 黑石完成规模超 130 亿美元亚洲私募股权基金募资，创下区域募资新高
content: Blackstone raised $13.1 billion for its largest Asia private equity fund, exceeding its $10 billion target and more than doubling its previous fund. The firm has deployed over $7 billion across 12 investments in India, Japan, and South Korea in two years, with 15 exits. The record fundraising signals renewed confidence in Asia-Pacific private equity despite challenging global conditions, where regional fundraising had hit decade lows amid high interest rates and geopolitical uncertainty.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 新浪科技

title: Anthropic 将 Mythos 项目拓展至 15 个国家新增 150 家机构
content: Anthropic expanded its Glasswing program to 150 new partner institutions across 15 countries, covering sectors like power, water, healthcare, and telecommunications. Partners use the Mythos tool to identify software security vulnerabilities and must pass security qualifications. The program has cumulatively detected over 10,000 high-risk vulnerabilities. Anthropic filed confidentially for an IPO with the U.S. SEC one day before the expansion announcement and opened Mythos access to the EU on Monday.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 格隆汇

title: OpenAI 计划为金融、法律领域开发 AI 工具，从而与 Anthropic 竞争

The company has been expanding its industry-specific offerings, including a ChatGPT personal finance tool with GPT-5.5 and bank account integration. This move follows earlier financial services tools and contrasts with Anthropic's own legal audit initiatives.

title: GitHub Copilot app: The agent-native desktop experience
content: GitHub launched the Copilot app, a technical preview desktop control center for managing multiple AI agents in parallel development workflows. It features git worktrees for isolated agent sessions, bidirectional canvases for inspectable human-agent collaboration, and cloud or local sandboxes for secure code execution. New capabilities include Agent Merge for autonomous PR handling, tiered code review with custom skills, an SDK for building agentic tools, CLI enhancements with voice input, scheduled cloud automations, cross-device memory, and partner integrations.

title: Steven Sinofsky on AI PCs, NVIDIA, and the Future of Computing

title: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
content: A report analyzing 832 banned accounts for malicious cyber activity between March 2025 and March 2026 found three key trends: AI enables less sophisticated actors to perform complex post-compromise techniques like lateral movement; traditional risk indicators—such as technique count or platform used—no longer reliably distinguish threat levels; and the MITRE ATT&CK framework fails to capture autonomous, agentic AI behaviors like real-time decision-making and minimal-intervention execution chains that define the most dangerous attackers.
